subject: fix(ci): pass Supabase env vars to build and document Pages source requirement
body:
The deploy workflow was missing VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
environment variables, causing the built app to have no backend connection.
Added these as secret references to the build step.

Also documented that GitHub Pages source must be set to "GitHub Actions"
(not "Deploy from a branch") — the most likely reason deployments appear
to do nothing when triggered manually.

Tags: ci, deployment, configuration
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
